arc_summary: A worn detective steers a quiet diner meeting into the question he's waited six years to ask.
emotional_baseline: Weary, patient, watchful; emotion compressed beneath a flat investigative calm.
motivations: Extract a confession or contradiction from Maya
Close a six-year-old case that has clearly haunted him
Control the tempo of the conversation
name: Det. Kowalski

arc_summary: A woman summoned for answers is cornered into admitting she was at the lake the night her sister vanished.
emotional_baseline: Exhausted grief held just under the surface; braced for accusation.
motivations: Unburden a six-year-old secret without fully incriminating herself
Protect the memory of her sister
name: Maya

arc_summary: A lifer waitress drifts through a tense interrogation offering coffee and pie, a brief note of normalcy.
emotional_baseline: Easy, maternal warmth; oblivious or politely indifferent to the tension at the booth.
motivations: Offer a small kindness (pie, coffee) in a bleak room
name: Rosie
